many-to-one.name: forecastedInvCustAccount
many-to-one.title: Forecasted invoice customer account
many-to-one.help: Select the customer account for accrued revenue (usually 4181) for end-of-year adjustments.

many-to-one.name: forecastedInvSuppAccount
many-to-one.title: Forecasted invoice supplier account
many-to-one.help: Select the supplier account for accrued expenses (usually 4081) for end-of-year adjustments.
